in-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0x32ba59b4b7299237c8ba56319110989d7978a039faf754793064e967e5894418","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1ae50c8b562427df610cc4540c9bf104acca7ef8e2dcae567ae7e52272281e9c","dweb:/ipfs/QmTHiadFCSJUPpRjNegc5SahmeU8bAoY8i9Aq6tVscbcKR"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x4296879f55019b23e135000eb36896057e7101fb7fb859c5ef690cf14643757b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://87b3541437c8c443ccd36795e56a338ed12855eec17f8da624511b8d1a7e14df","dweb:/ipfs/QmeJQCtZrQjtJLr6u7ZHWeH3pBnjtLWzvRrKViAi7UZqxL"]},"src/ResolutionModule.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2214df2dc31b5c3b6ba85989dd2bcb817986a4fac7b00bf8d92608f5528b09eb","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://99167b6d59a30ec2088b715f17fb2137546429422fdb958ac66f940eed60add7","dweb:/ipfs/QmWCypTr2DMmv2yW7kZAtRCAayRhB8HLjnqrRpzL4ZKDcU"]},"src/interfaces/IPredictionPool.sol":{"keccak256":"0x84a48fc811e305d3f2cf83477de957d6968971738efec4beec9fe97bacd527f3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://03d1c599ded0b99a74cabe3e39f3e950b880a138d2a0414de6123f70208790f5","dweb:/ipfs/QmQ7b9aCiY2MMUC7zJRGpQx97pxx6Cjok8w2TpqSHLKYt6"]},"src/interfaces/IResolutionModule.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6391b645ac9b12b6b9266caff5cf9ed88c032a319d965b12f5a4dd33f2d7c9bd","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b33377b942495f9829b1125fe38fa18910ec1fd5146624cd0453c7ad76eadb78","dweb:/ipfs/QmRkjPhhSrybv9VkVm3SWELRGc3P3KF6QejXnTVxjs5WYD"]}},"version":1}

finalize(uint256).details: Callable when quorum reached OR vote window has expired

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

returns.counts: Array of vote counts (index 0 = No, index 1 = Yes)

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

returns._0: True if the user is a resolver

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

finalize(uint256).notice: Manually trigger finalization — anyone can call

getTally(uint256).notice: Returns the vote tally for a goal

isResolver(uint256,address).notice: Checks if an address is a registered resolver for a goal

setPool(address).notice: Sets the PredictionPool address — only DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE

startVote(uint256).notice: Called by PredictionPool.lockGoal — starts the vote window for a goal

submitVote(uint256,uint8).notice: Submit a vote for a goal outcome
